geographic_restrictions: Greater Philadelphia area (Bucks, Chester, Delaware, Montgomery, and Philadelphia counties in Pennsylvania; Burlington, Camden, Gloucester, and Mercer counties in New Jersey)
project_area: Visual fine arts (painting, drawing, printmaking, photography, sculpture) including purchases, commissions, exhibitions, and educational/cultural projects benefiting local artists
demographic_requirements: Projects must benefit visual fine artists from the Greater Philadelphia area. Organizations must have a non-discrimination policy covering race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, and other legally protected characteristics.
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations (501c3) or museums with a track record of at least three professional public exhibits/projects in the last five years. Religious institutions may only apply for nonsectarian activities. Grants cannot fund prior activities, endowments, capital projects, advocacy, or individual artists. Applications are not open to individuals.
